arts.ttl: Liverpool have five Khivcha Kvaratskhelia alternatives as PSG complete Kylian Mbappe replacement mission
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain announce the signing of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on a long-term contract from Napoli, as Liverpool concede defeat in the race for the Georgian.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé sends message to Real Madrid legend after win over Celta Vigo

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Joins Karim Benzema as Only Real Madrid Players to Accomplish Historic Feat
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé and Karim Benzema are the only two Real Madrid players to score in six competitions in one season.
